title: No rate limiting — public API without abuse protection
expected_feedback: Standard: Public API with partner consumers has no rate limiting defined. Without rate limits, a single partner (intentionally or accidentally) can overwhelm the service with requests, degrading performance for all consumers. Fix: define per-API-key rate limits (e.g., 1000 requests/min), return 429 Too Many Requests with Retry-After header when exceeded. Consider different tiers for different partner plans. Document limits in API documentation and OpenAPI spec.
violated_rule: Rate limiting defined per actor type
